queries.q: Help me write Q3 OKRs for the growth team
Review these draft OKRs and tell me where the key results are really just features
queries.notes: Audit Only mode; draft review belongs to the writer, not the grader

queries.q: Translate the company strategy pillar on retention into measurable team outcomes for next quarter
Convert this roadmap list into proper outcome-based OKRs
Coach me through drafting an objective and key results for the platform team, one piece at a time
Our KRs all say launch X by some date; rewrite them so they measure behavior change instead
Just draft a complete OKR set from this product context in one pass and label your assumptions
Leadership handed us a parent objective; turn it into department OKRs we can actually commit to
I need quarterly objectives with baselines, targets, and guardrail metrics before the planning offsite
Critique this OKR draft: are the objectives inspiring and the key results measurable?
The quarter is over; score each KR against its target and tell us what we learned
queries.notes: Cycle has ended; formal scoring with learning synthesis is the partner's job

queries.q: Cycle close is Friday; produce the scorecard with evidence confidence for every key result
queries.notes: End-of-cycle scoring, not drafting or reviewing drafts

queries.q: Grade our completed Q1 OKR set, separating committed from aspirational interpretation
queries.notes: Grading a completed set belongs to the grader

queries.q: Spec the dashboard we need to track our north star metric
queries.notes: Only a dashboard spec is needed

queries.q: Write a testable hypothesis with success metrics for the onboarding change
Design the A/B test that will validate our activation assumption
Define the event tracking plan for the new checkout funnel
Fix this TypeScript error: property does not exist on type unknown
Write a SQL query that returns weekly active teams by region
Help me draft a wedding toast for my best friend
